summary: Completed comprehensive testing of multi-pet selection for Stay and Dine booking forms, navigation link fixes, fresh meals products, and MealPlanPage. All 6 features are working correctly.

1_stay_booking_multi_pet.details: Stay booking form accepts both single pet (backward compatible) and multi-pet array. BookingRequestModal shows 'Who's Coming Along?' with all 4 pets (Mojo, Lola, Mystique, Luna) with checkboxes and 'Travelling' badges. Shows '4 pets travelling: Mojo, Lola, Mystique, Luna' summary.

2_dine_reservation_multi_pet.details: Dine reservation form accepts both single pet (backward compatible) and multi-pet array. ReservationModal shows 'Who's Dining With You?' with all pets with checkboxes and 'Dining' badges.

3_meal_plans_link.details: Meal Plans link in Dine dropdown correctly points to /meal-plan (verified via href attribute)

4_stay_essentials_link.details: Stay Essentials link in Stay dropdown correctly points to /stay#essentials (verified via href attribute)

5_fresh_meals_products.details: Dine page shows 'Fresh Pet Meals' section with Fresh Treats, Fresh Meals, and Birthday Cakes. API /api/dine/products returns products from both 'dine' and 'fresh-meals' categories.

6_meal_plan_page.details: MealPlanPage loads correctly. Shows 'Sign in to view your meal plan' for non-logged-in users. For logged-in users, shows personalized meal plan with pet tabs (Mojo, Lola, Mystique, Luna), meal structure (2 meals/day, Regular portion, Fresh & Baked Mix), and suggested meal times.

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_85.py - Created comprehensive test file for multi-pet selection and navigation
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user with 4 pets
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-pet selection is fully functional in both Stay and Dine booking modals. Backend accepts pets as array with pet objects containing id, name, breed. Frontend shows checkboxes for each pet with badges (Travelling/Dining). MealPlanPage shows personalized meal plans based on pet profile. Navigation links updated: Meal Plans -> /meal-plan, Stay Essentials -> /stay#essentials.

verified_flows.stay_booking: Login -> Stay page -> Request Booking -> Fill user details -> Continue to Pets step -> See all 4 pets with checkboxes -> Select/deselect pets -> Continue to Trip step -> Submit booking
verified_flows.dine_reservation: Login -> Dine page -> Click Reserve on restaurant -> See 'Who's Dining With You?' with all pets -> Select/deselect pets -> Fill date/time/guests -> Submit reservation
verified_flows.meal_plan: Login -> Navigate to /meal-plan -> See personalized meal plan for first pet -> Switch between pet tabs -> View meal structure and recommendations
verified_flows.navigation_links: Hover over Dine menu -> Click 'Meal Plans' -> Navigate to /meal-plan | Hover over Stay menu -> Click 'Stay Essentials' -> Navigate to /stay#essentials
